# MAOMIAI Desktop Design System

## Brand
primary: #2563eb
accent: #7c3aed
font: Inter, system-ui
radius: 16px
shadow: soft

## Colors
primary: #2563eb
surface: #ffffff
muted: #f8fafc
success: #16a34a
danger: #dc2626

## Components
### Button
Use rounded corners and clear hover state.
### Card
Use soft shadow and clear spacing.
### Modal
Use backdrop and explicit cancel/confirm actions.
### Table
Use sticky header and visible empty state.
